name: coding-agent
description: A Claude Code-backed peer agent for scoped coding tasks, patch planning, implementation, review, and test strategy.

skills.name: Code implementation
skills.description: Implement scoped code changes inside the assigned project root.

skills.name: Code review
skills.description: Review code for bugs, regressions, missing tests, and maintainability risks.

skills.name: Test strategy
skills.description: Recommend focused verification commands and test coverage for a scoped change.
